HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

10#ifndef TRIQUADPOL_H
11#define TRIQUADPOL_H

18
20
36class TriQuadPol {
37private:
38 Triangle* Tp;
39 rvec pos;
40 std::vector<rvec> vertsInPlane;
41 rvec posInPlane;
42 int nQuadrature;
43 double(*xQuadrature)[2];
44 double* wQuadrature;
45 std::vector<rvec> quadPoints;
46 std::vector<double> quadWeights;
47
48public:
58 TriQuadPol(Triangle* inTp, rvec inPos, int nQuadrature,
59 double(*xQuadrature)[2], double* wQuadrature);
60
67 void adaptPolar();
68
74 void transformInPlane();
75
81 bool sameSign(double a, double b, double c) {
82 return (a >= 0.0 && b >= 0.0 && c >= 0.0) ||
83 (a <= 0.0 && b <= 0.0 && c <= 0.0);
84 }
85
92 bool pointInTriangle(const rvec& P, const rvec& A, const rvec& B, const rvec& C) {
93 auto outerProd = [](const rvec& p1, const rvec& p2, const rvec& p3) {
94 return (p1[0] - p3[0]) * (p2[1] - p3[1]) - (p2[0] - p3[0]) * (p1[1] - p3[1]);
95 };
96
97 double d1 = outerProd(P, A, B);
98 double d2 = outerProd(P, B, C);
99 double d3 = outerProd(P, C, A);
100
101 return sameSign(d1, d2, d3);
102 }
103
110 double clean(double x, double eps = 1e-10) {
111 return std::abs(x) < eps ? 0.0 : x;
112 }
113
125 std::pair<double, double> lineInPolar(double theta1, double rho1, double theta2, double rho2);
126
138 void adaptIn(double theta0, double thetaStart, double thetaEnd, double tLine, double dLine,
139 std::vector<double>& intThetas, std::vector<double>& intWeights,
140 std::vector<double>& minRadius, std::vector<double>& maxRadius);
141
154 void adaptOut(double theta0, double thetaStart, double thetaEnd,
155 double tLineFirst, double dLineFirst, double tLineSecond, double dLineSecond,
156 std::vector<double>& intThetas, std::vector<double>& intWeights,
157 std::vector<double>& minRadius, std::vector<double>& maxRadius);
158
167 void assembleFromPolar(const std::vector<double>& inThetas, const std::vector<double>& inWeights,
168 const std::vector<double>& inMinRadii, const std::vector<double>& inMaxRadii);
169
174 std::vector<rvec> getQuadPoints() { return quadPoints; }
175
180 std::vector<double> getQuadWeights() { return quadWeights; }
181};
182
183#endif
